hero.title: Elevate Your Tennis Game with Play
hero.subtitle: Book our premium tennis ball machines and practice at your own pace. Perfect your technique, improve your reflexes, and take your game to the next level.

aiCoach.heading: Your AI-powered practice court
aiCoach.subtitle: Get training plan. Book a ball machine. Improve every session.
aiCoach.placeholder: Ask me anything about tennis, padel etc ...
prompts: How can I improve my tennis serve?
What drills should I do for better footwork?
Tips for hitting a topspin forehand
How to practice alone with a ball machine?

booking.heading: AI coaching meets ball machine booking
booking.subtitle: Everything you need to level up, in one place.

steps.title: Tell the AI coach about yourself
steps.description: Share your experience, level, and goals. Tell us what you want to accomplish — it takes less than a minute.

steps.title: Get your training plan
steps.description: Play8 builds a structured session into customized drill cards with precise machine parameters.

steps.title: Book a ball machine
steps.description: Pick a court and book a ball machine. Train and adapt your plans on the fly.

steps.title: Train with purpose
steps.description: Take notes, get insights and advice during or after your training sessions.

features.title: Why Choose Play8?
features.subtitle: Not just a ball machine. A system that makes you better.

cards.title: AI–designed sessions
cards.description: Every drill has a reason. The AI Coach breaks your practice into focused cards with specific goals — not random balls flying at you.

cards.title: Ball machine settings, done for you
cards.description: No more guessing speed, spin, or frequency. Each drill card includes recommended machine parameters matched to the exercise.

cards.title: Built for every level
cards.description: Whether you picked up a racket last month or you're training for competition, the AI adjusts to where you are — and pushes you forward.

cards.title: No partner, no problem
cards.description: Walk in solo and train like you have a hitting partner. The ball machine follows your plan — you just focus on your game.

testimonials.title: What Our Players Say
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what tennis enthusiasts think about Play8.

session.title: Start your next session right here.
session.description: Let the AI Coach plan your training. Book a ball machine. Get on court.
